title: Create a dedicated canonical repository for the Symphonie workflow
approval_evidence: Apruebo DEC-LAB-010 y DEC-LAB-011 exactamente como fueron formuladas, autorizando su registro documental en chatgpt-prototype-lab, pero sin autorizar todavía la creación del repositorio Symphonie, su bootstrap, runtime, integración, migración ni ejecución.

decision.summary: Create marcellusanthonson-ctrl/symphonie as the private canonical repository for the Symphonie workflow, while retaining chatgpt-prototype-lab as the governance source of truth, MammothSkills as the canonical skill producer, and symphonie-codex-lab as historical experimental evidence.

symphonie: installed skill release identities and compatibility evidence

decision.local_governance_rule: governance files inside Symphonie mirror or bind to LAB authority; they do not create independent approval authority

conditions_before_terminal_classificatio: repeatability criteria explicitly defined and satisfied
any migration separately authorized and completed
